page.title: Knowledge
page.subtitle: Projects, global bio, and privacy controls for what the AI remembers.

bodies.entities: Browse entities extracted into your knowledge graph.
bodies.raw: Vector-search the full set of extracted knowledge drawers.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Projects scope what the AI remembers for a specific piece of work.

projects.paginationNote: Showing first 100 projects — full pagination lands with Track 2.

form.createDescription: A project scopes what the AI remembers for a specific piece of work.
form.name: Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. Winds of the Eastern Sea
form.typeImmutable: Project type is immutable after creation.
form.instructionsPlaceholder: Style notes, voice, constraints — injected into every chat for this project.

archiveDialog.title: Archive project?
archiveDialog.description: "{{name}}" will be hidden from the active list. You can restore it later.

deleteDialog.title: Delete project?
deleteDialog.description: "{{name}}" and its summary will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

toast.conflict: Another device modified this project. Review the latest and save again.
toast.noPriorJob: No previous job to replay — open the Build dialog.
toast.noPriorRebuild: No previous job to rebuild from.

disabled.body: Using: your bio + project instructions + glossary + recent messages.

estimating.body: Fetching a cost estimate for this scope...

ready_to_build.hint: Estimated cost: ${{low}} – ${{high}} · {{chapters}} chapters, {{turns}} chat turns, {{tokens}} tokens

building_paused_user.body: You paused this job. Resume when ready, or cancel to keep the partial graph.

building_paused_budget.body: Hit the spend cap of ${{budget}}. Raise the cap and resume, or cancel to keep the partial graph.

stale.body: {{count}} new chapters since last extraction. Extract them now or ignore.

model_change_pending.body: Model change from {{oldModel}} to {{newModel}} requires deleting the existing graph and rebuilding.

buildDialog.title: Build knowledge graph
buildDialog.description: Extract entities, facts, and passages from this project's content. Pick a scope and models, then preview the cost before confirming.

scope.label: Scope
scope.noBookHint: This project isn't linked to a book — the chapters scope is hidden.

llmModel.label: LLM model
llmModel.empty: No chat-capable models configured. Add one in AI Models → Credentials.

maxSpend.label: Max spend (USD, optional)
maxSpend.hint: Hard cap — the job pauses when cumulative cost reaches this. Leave blank for no cap.
maxSpend.invalid: Enter a non-negative amount with up to 2 decimals.

estimate.heading: Cost preview
estimate.pickLlmFirst: Pick an LLM model to see a cost estimate.

errorViewer.title: Extraction error
errorViewer.description: Full error message captured from the extraction job. Use it for bug reports or root-cause analysis.

changeModelDialog.title: Change embedding model
changeModelDialog.description: Switching the embedding model requires deleting the existing knowledge graph. You'll need to start a new extraction afterwards.
changeModelDialog.warningBody: Current model: {{currentModel}}. Changing it deletes all extracted entities, facts, events, and passages. Extraction will be disabled until you start a new build.
changeModelDialog.sameModel: Pick a different model to enable Confirm.
changeModelDialog.alreadyAtModel: Model already set to {{model}} — another device may have changed it.

deleteGraph.title: Delete knowledge graph?
deleteGraph.description: This permanently removes all extracted entities, facts, events, and passages for this project. The project stays; you can rebuild later.

rebuildStep1.title: Rebuild from scratch?
rebuildStep1.description: Rebuild deletes the existing graph and starts a fresh extraction with the same models and scope. This can cost money and take a while.

rebuildStep2.title: Last chance — really rebuild?
rebuildStep2.description: Clicking Rebuild now starts the destruction-and-rebuild. There's no undo once the new job is running.

disable.title: Disable extraction?
disable.description: Stops new content from being extracted. The existing knowledge graph is preserved and still readable. Re-enabling requires starting a new extraction.

global.title: Global bio
global.description: A short description of you the AI can see in every project. Style preferences, context about your work, anything you want to carry across sessions. Max {{max}} characters.
global.placeholder: e.g. I write urban fantasy. Keep names in Japanese order. Use sparing prose, no purple adjectives.
global.conflict: Another device updated this bio. Review the latest and save again.

versions.title: Version history
versions.empty: No prior versions — history starts building after your next save.
versions.confirmBody: Your current bio will be replaced with the content from v{{version}}. A new version will be created; the current state will be archived in history.

popover.projectBody: This session is linked to {{name}}. The AI sees your global bio plus the project's summary and glossary entries on every turn.
popover.globalBody: This session has no project linked. The AI sees only your global bio. Link a project in session settings to give it access to book-specific memory.
popover.degradedBody: Knowledge service was unreachable on the last turn. The AI fell back to recent messages only — your project memory is temporarily not in the prompt. Will recover automatically on the next turn once the service is back.

picker.label: Project memory
picker.hint: Links this chat to a knowledge-service project so the AI sees its summary and glossary on every turn.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download every project and summary the AI has stored for you, as a single JSON file. GDPR Article 20.

delete.title: Delete all knowledge data
delete.description: Permanently erase every project and summary. This does not touch your books, chapters, or account — only what the memory system has stored. This cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Delete all knowledge data?
dialog.description: This will permanently delete every project and summary. Type {{token}} below to confirm.
